title: CarlderGross' Tweaks
description: A vanilla-style mod that adds several minor features to improve the Minecraft experience.
body:
Introduces various minor features to enhance the Minecraft experience.

### Alternate Stone Tools
- Introduces tools made from andesite, diorite, and granite.
- Includes compatibility with Tetra.

### Craftable Chainmail
- Adds a crafting method for chainmail, which is more in-depth but uses less resources than iron armor.
  - One iron nugget is crafted into two chain links. Nine chain links craft a chain panel. Chainmail armor is made from chain panels in the usual armor pattern.

### Additional Crafting Recipes
- Introduces crafting recipes for saddles and nametags.
- Allows wool to be crafted into string.
- Allows arrows to be crafted using iron nuggets for the arrowhead.
- Allows mushroom stew to be crafted using three mushrooms of the same type.
